notes: Future KG site extraction for 767 sites (snapshot 20260624T095651). Scenario: SSP5-8.5 / 2071_2099. Same terra::extract() + nearest-land fallback method as present-day (scripts/step4_extract_koppen_beck2023.R). This CSV records PROJECTED future class at each site's PRESENT location. For figures, the network bar uses present-day assignments from site_koppen_beck2023.csv, NOT this file.
